hero.title: The OpenClaw Community Hub You Can Trust
hero.description: OpenClaw Hub is an unofficial community site for OpenClaw — the autonomous AI assistant. Discover curated skills with security ratings, bilingual guides in English and Chinese, and real-world usage reviews. Use it safely and confidently.

features.title: What OpenClaw Hub Offers

items.title: Skill Directory
items.description: Browse hand-picked skills with security ratings, user reviews, and installation instructions — updated regularly by the community.

items.title: Security Guides
items.description: Learn to identify risky skills, set up sandboxed environments, and follow best practices for running local AI agents safely.

items.title: Community Resources

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Have a question we haven't answered? Join our community discussions.

items.question: What is OpenClaw Hub?
items.answer: OpenClaw Hub is an unofficial community site dedicated to helping people use OpenClaw safely and effectively. We provide curated skills with security ratings, bilingual guides, and practical tutorials — all maintained by the community.

items.question: Is this the official OpenClaw website?
items.answer: No. OpenClaw Hub is a community-run site and is not affiliated with or endorsed by the official OpenClaw project. For official information, visit openclaw.ai.

items.question: How do you rate skill safety?
items.answer: We review each skill's source code, requested permissions, and dependencies. Skills are rated A (minimal access, well-reviewed) through D (broad permissions, use with caution) based on potential risk to your system.

items.question: How do I install OpenClaw?
items.answer: Visit the official documentation at openclaw.ai for installation instructions. OpenClaw Hub provides supplementary guides and troubleshooting tips to help you through common issues.

items.question: Are the skills listed here official?
items.answer: The skills in our directory are community-created and maintained. While we review them for safety, always treat third-party code with caution — inspect before installing, and use isolated environments when possible.

items.question: How can I contribute?
items.answer: We welcome contributions! You can submit new skills, improve existing guides, translate content, or share your experience. Join our community discussions to get involved.

cta.title: Start Your Journey Safely
cta.description: Explore curated skills, read security guides, and join a community that has your back. OpenClaw Hub is here to help you get the most out of your AI assistant.
